## Meeting Purpose

[Calendar calibration and optimization for Marcel's schedule, focusing on efficient time management and meeting preparation.](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Color-coding system implemented for different meeting types (e.g., networking, internal, client meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Prioritizing hiring managing editors as the top current focus](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Shifting client meetings to Wednesdays and Thursdays when possible](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Implementing a notes system for meeting context and preparation](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Color-Coding System

  - [Implemented color-coding for different meeting types:](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Yellow: Prospecting/sales meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Purple: Networking meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Dark Green: Internal meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Red: Breaks and do-not-schedule blocks](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Aim to cluster similar meeting types on the same day for better focus](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Gray indicates meetings that need to be rescheduled or moved](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Meeting Preparation and Context

  - [Added a "Notes" calendar for private meeting context](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Include relevant information like LinkedIn profiles, company details, and relationship context](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Use AI tools (e.g., Perplexity, Slack AI) to gather and summarize information about companies and individuals](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Client Meeting Strategy

  - [Aim to schedule client meetings on Wednesdays and Thursdays](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Marcel to join at least one client meeting per month, ideally every 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Account managers to provide brief executive summaries before Marcel joins calls](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Hiring Priority

  - [Hiring managing editors is the current top priority](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Marcel reviewing applications and conducting interviews personally](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Expect this to take up significant time in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Specific Client Situations

  - [Home Base: First customer, working to save the account after personnel changes](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Reddit: Upcoming workshop, considering inviting Kyle to join](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### Calendar Management Best Practices

  - [Use brackets at the beginning of event titles for important keywords (e.g., \[KICKOFF\])](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Include parking information for in-person meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Be mindful of recurring meetings when rescheduling](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Coordinate with account managers and Jimmy when moving client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prepare for upcoming Reddit workshop and webinar slides](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Coordinate with Kyle about potentially joining the Reddit workshop](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Continue reviewing managing editor applications and prepare for upcoming interviews](https://fathom.video/share/aCrFxeZoHgPicYDmDzVzAWT2ujafCxc9?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
